summary: A brief promotional post sharing a 15% off coupon code for Rockler.com, a woodworking supply retailer. Shapiro highlights a few product categories including an amusingly expensive musical jewelry box kit, finishing products, and sanding supplies. The post is essentially a quick tip for fellow woodworkers and makers.
key_points: Shares a specific coupon code (V5108) for 15% off at Rockler woodworking supplies
Highlights the absurdity of a high-end musical jewelry box kit while pointing to practical supplies
Demonstrates Shapiro's long-standing interest in maker culture and woodworking, years before founding Glowforge
money_quotes: Don't miss this if you're planning on building the world's most expensive musical jewelery box.
key_insight: An early glimpse into Shapiro's maker culture roots, sharing woodworking deals with his audience long before his laser-cutter company days.
